aids.title: BCA - Why DL Works Now
aids.content: **B**ig Data, **C**ompute Power, **A**lgorithm Advances - The three pillars of deep learning success.

aids.title: The Onion Analogy
aids.content: Deep learning is like peeling an onion - each layer reveals more abstract features. Outer layers = raw edges, inner layers = complex concepts like faces or objects.

aids.title: ML vs DL Quick Comparison
aids.content: Traditional ML = You engineer features, model learns mapping. Deep Learning = Model engineers features AND learns mapping.
aids.forRemembering: Key difference between ML and DL

aids.title: DL History: 43-58-86-12-17
aids.content: 1943 (neuron), 1958 (perceptron), 1986 (backprop), 2012 (AlexNet), 2017 (Transformer) - Key milestones in neural network history.
